## Validacao
- [ ] `npm run check`
- [ ] `npm run docs:api` quando contratos/docs mudaram
- [ ] `npm run test:e2e` quando UI/navegacao mudou
- [ ] `npm run db:test:migrations` quando schema/seed mudou
- [ ] `npm run perf:smoke` quando performance/endpoint quente mudou
